name_en: 💖【Complete Original Packaging】💖【New Arrival】Best-selling vintage-style underarm bag, made of new soft fat sheepskin, soft and premium leather. This Aventure leather bag is inspired by the 2009 M-series classic design, restructured to reinterpret the unique shape and refresh its personality. Embossed letter logo adds a signature element, vintage gold hardware, linen blend lining, and a long wrist strap for use as a handbag or shoulder bag.
name_cn:

Model: 5BC182.
Size: 33x19x5cm
Color: Ebony/Original Leather.
Italian Craft
